name: Chicken & Peppers for 1
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Green pepper, cut into 1-inch squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare: 10 minutes, cooking 4 minutes. Remove bone and skin from chicken breast. Cut meat into 1-inch squares.
2. In a bowl, combine cornstarch, sherry, and dash salt. Pour over chicken pieces and toss with a fork to coat well.
3. Heat 2 tsp oil in a heavy skillet or wok. Add chicken and cook over high heat for 2 minutes, stirring briskly.
4. Using a slotted spoon, lift out the chicken and keep it hot.
5. Add 1 tsp oil to the pan. Add green pepper, celery, and crushed red peppers. Cook over high heat for 1 minute, stirring.
6. Add water, sugar, dash salt, and water chestnuts. Cover tightly and cook quickly for 30 seconds.
7. Remove the cover, add the chicken pieces, and stir for an additional 30 seconds.
8. Serve immediately with rice or noodles and steamed broccoli or asparagus.
From the files of Al Rice, North Pole Alaska. Feb 1994
